created_by_slice: P91 npm Metadata Connector Runtime Planning v0
worktree_status: P91 artifacts generated after initial clean inspection.
runtime_boundary: P91 is planning-only. It does not implement the npm metadata connector runtime, does not call npm registry APIs or npmjs.com, does not call npm/yarn/pnpm CLI, does not fetch package metadata, version metadata, dist-tag metadata, or tarball metadata, does not download tarballs or package files, does not install packages, resolve dependencies, run npm audit, inspect package archives, execute lifecycle scripts, run source sync jobs, write source-cache or evidence-ledger records, wire public search to live calls, enable arbitrary package or registry fetch, downloads, mirroring, credentials, tokens, or telemetry, and does not mutate public, local, runtime, candidate, source-cache, evidence-ledger, or master indexes.
connector_runtime_architecture_plan: future client.py bounded npm package metadata client
future package_policy.py package identity and scoped-package guard
future dependency_policy.py dependency metadata caution guard
future normalize.py source-cache npm summary normalizer
future evidence.py evidence observation candidate builder
source_sync_job_flow: source policy guard checks connector approval
package identity guard validates approved package-name source
scoped package guard rejects private or credentialed scopes
dependency metadata caution guard verifies metadata-only handling
lifecycle-script risk guard verifies no execution and no script-safety claim
token/auth guard verifies token-free v0 unless future policy approves otherwise
bounded failure record without raw payload
package_identity_review_normalization_pl: Allowed future package-name sources are reviewed source records, reviewed search needs, source pack records, manual observation records, and fixture examples. Raw public query parameters, private packages, private scopes, credentialed registries, alternate registries without future approval, localhost URLs, file URLs, uploaded files, local paths, and arbitrary URLs are forbidden.
validation_normalization_plan: Validate response shape, package name, scoped package names, package metadata, versions, dist-tags, deprecation status, engines metadata, dependency metadata without dependency resolution, lifecycle script metadata without execution, tarball metadata without tarball download, checksum/digest metadata when present as metadata, license/source terms caution, publisher/maintainer caution, source attribution, error envelopes, raw payload exclusion, tarball/package file exclusion, and private package/registry redaction or rejection.
failure_retry_timeout_circuit_breaker_pl: Timeouts, bounded retries, retry-after/abuse-limit backoff, per-source rate limits, circuit breaker, no retry storms, no public-search blocking, no raw error leaks, connector disabled on policy violation, and operator-visible summaries are required.
public_search_boundary: Public search must not call npm live or accept arbitrary package, scoped-package, or registry parameters for live fetch; future cards may only read reviewed public-safe summaries after separate runtime and review.
privacy_rights_risk_review: Package-metadata-only with package identity review, scoped package review, dependency metadata caution, and lifecycle-script risk review; no private packages, private scopes, token-required registries, alternate registries without future policy, tarball/package file download, package archive inspection, package install, dependency resolution, lifecycle script execution, npm audit, package manager invocation, downloads, mirroring, install, execute, credentials, private account access, rights clearance claim, tarball safety claim, script safety claim, installability claim, dependency safety claim, vulnerability claim, or malware safety claim.
security_abuse_review: Rate limits, timeout, circuit breaker, User-Agent/contact, token-free default, cache requirement, kill switch, no public fanout, package identity guard, scoped package guard, dependency metadata guard, lifecycle-script guard, source policy guard, token/auth guard, and operator approval are required.

initial_inspection.summary: P75 approval pack and contracts were present; connector_approved_now is false; package identity, scoped package, dependency metadata, lifecycle-script, token/auth, source policy, package download/install/dependency/script boundaries, and operator values are pending.

approval_and_ingestion_contracts.summary: Existing npm approval, PyPI/GitHub/Wayback/IA runtime plans, source sync, source cache, and evidence ledger contracts remained valid and contract-only.

public_search_static_and_safety.summary: Local public-search safety/static lanes passed. No public-search runtime fanout or npm connector behavior was added.

hosted_deployment_and_baseline.summary: Hosted backend remains not configured, static route verification remains failed, and Manual Observation Batch 0 remains 0 observed / 39 pending.

evals_and_full_tests.summary: Archive evals passed 6/6. Search usefulness remains 64 queries with capability_gap=7, covered=5, partial=40, source_gap=10, unknown=2. Full Python/unit/boundary/diff lanes passed.

optional.summary: Optional gh and cargo commands were unavailable because the executables are not installed.
